steps.title: Clear the fraction
steps.content: Starting from $$b - 22 = \frac{x}{y},$$ multiply both sides by $y$ to eliminate the denominator: $$y(b - 22) = x.$$

steps.title: Check each choice
steps.content:
• A ($x = \frac{by - 22}{y}$): only the $b$ term was multiplied by $y$, leaving an unsimplified fraction — not equivalent.
  • B ($x = by - 22$): forgets to multiply the $-22$ by $y$.
  • C ($x = by - 22y$): exactly matches the distributed form.
  • D ($x = \frac{b - 22}{y}$): divides by $y$ instead of multiplying.
That matches choice C — C is correct.
